axilla
blood
breast
bronchus
buccal mucosa
caecum
cervicovaginal secretion
colon
colonic mucosa
dental plaque
dorsum
ear
elbow
endocervix
external naris
feces
gingiva
mastoid lymph node
head
hypopharynx
ileum
internal naris
lower lip
lower part of vagina
lung
mesenteric lymph node
meconium
hard palate
milk
mouth
mucosa
mucosa of small intestine
mucosa of stomach
nasal cavity
nasopharynx
neck
nose
oral gland
oropharynx
pair of nares
palatine tonsils
placenta
posterior fornix of vagina
prostate gland secretion
rectal
retroauricular region
saliva
skin of body
skin of cheek
skin of forearm
skin of sole of pes
small intestine
sputum
stomach
subgingival dental plaque
throat
tongue
urine
uterine cervix
uterus
vagina
vagina orifice
